title: astramem/atom@1
description: Canonical Memory Atom v1 (ADR-001). Single schema both astramem-local and AstraMem cloud implement. Additive fields = minor version; breaking changes = new major with a dual-read window.

type.description: Registry-extensible, closed by default. v1 registry = the 7 types both implementations ship today. New types are additive (minor version bump); consumers seeing an unknown type should degrade gracefully rather than reject the atom.

evidence.description: Receipts — never optional. ADR-001 specifies an array of {transcript_id, span} references. Reality: astramem-local v1 stores evidence as a single free-text excerpt string (see src/contracts/memory.ts Memory.evidence, migration 004-provenance.sql). This schema models both forms as the pragmatic contract truth; see contracts/README.md 'Evidence reconciliation' for the migration path from string -> array-of-refs.

anyOf.description: Local v1 form: a short free-text excerpt supporting the atom.
ADR-001 canonical form: structured receipts pointing at source transcript spans.

provenance.description: Where this atom came from. Local maps its flat memories columns (agent, session_id, repo, project) plus a static extractor tag onto this object at the wire boundary (see src/contracts/atom-wire.ts).

extractor.description: name@version of the extractor that produced this atom.

valid_to.description: Bitemporal valid-time end. null = currently valid.

scope.description: ADR-009 memory scope. personal is the default.

content_hash.description: sha256 hex digest — dedup + sync idempotency (ADR-003).
